title: ophrys exaltata subsp. mateolana
intro: Ophrys exaltata subsp. mateolana, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its unique, bee-like appearance. The medicinal properties of Ophrys exaltata subsp. mateolana include its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a sedative, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ophrys exaltata subsp. mateolana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
